description: An esports manager needs to schedule the regular weekly tournament in the game's system.

nodes.task_description: Create a new tournament event in the event management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the event container.

nodes.task_description: Set the tournament parameters, including date, time, game mode, and prize pool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures all tournament details.
Agent makes the tournament visible and open for sign-ups in the game client.
